name: Intune Make Enrollment User Admin
description: This Intune-deployable script elevates the enrollment user to a local administrator on Windows devices. Packaged as an .INTUNEWIN app, it is deployed through Microsoft Intune to targeted users with install and uninstall commands to grant or revoke admin rights after enrollment. It uses a requirements check for detection and can be reconfigured later, providing an Autopilot-like capability fully managed by Intune.
keywords: how to make user local admin intune
author: Niklas Rast

securityCheck.aiSummary: The code mainly handles enrolling a user as a local administrator, which is a sensitive privileged operation appropriate for Intune enrollment tooling. No obfuscated code, remote script downloads, credential theft, data exfiltration, or hardcoded secrets detected. Primary security consideration is controlled, auditable privilege escalation. Improve locale handling to ensure reliability across multilingual Windows environments.
